reviews.comment:
Buena atención de los playeros. Excepcionalmente cargue nafta. Personalmente no es buen combustible YPF, lamentablemente Shell y Axxion hoy x hoy son superiores.

(Translated by Google)
The beach attendants were excellent. I filled up with gas exceptionally well. Personally, YPF isn't a good fuel; unfortunately, Shell and Axxion are currently superior.

reviews.comment:
Esta en punto estrategico, los playeros buena atemcion el shop/bar esta bien ubicado con buuenos productos y precios. Solo tendria que organizarse el depsacho de combustible, muchas veces tardas de mas sin necesidad.

(Translated by Google)
It's in a strategic location, the attendants are attentive, and the shop/bar is well-situated with good products and prices. The only thing that needs improvement is the fuel station; it often takes longer than necessary.
